name: tibco-vectordb-get-doc
title: Get Document
description: Retrieve a single document by its ID.

display.name: VectorDB Connection
display.description: Select the VectorDB connector to use

display.name: Default Collection
display.description: Fallback collection name when not provided in the activity input

output.name: document
output.schema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"id": {"type": "string", "description": "Unique document ID"}, "content": {"type": "string", "description": "Source text"}, "vector": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "number"}, "description": "Dense embedding vector"}, "payload": {"type": "object", "description": "Metadata key-value pairs"}, "score": {"type": "number", "description": "Similarity score (populated by search)"}}}
